'''Allaya Djo''' was the daughter of [[Augwynne Djo]], mother of [[Teneniel Djo]], and grandmother of [[Tenel Ka Djo]]. She was the warmaster of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] until her untimely death in the desert.<ref name="CoPL" />

==Behind the scenes==
The mother of Teneniel Djo was first mentioned in the [[1994]] novel, ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', written by [[Dave Wolverton]].<ref name="CoPL" /> She was first given the name Allaya Djo in the [[1995]] reference book, ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'', written by [[Andy Mangels]].<ref name="TEGtC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>
